doctor.default_greeting: You look like you need medical attention. Step into my clinic.

idle: Step right up if you're injured.
Best medical care in the wasteland.
Don't let those rads pile up.
greeting: How can I help you today?

rank_greetings.Idolized: My finest patient! Whatever you need, it's on the house.
rank_greetings.Admired: Good to see a healthy face. What can I do for you?
rank_greetings.Liked: Welcome back. Keeping out of trouble?
rank_greetings.Accepted: You look like you could use some medical attention.
rank_greetings.Neutral: You look like you need medical attention. Step into my clinic.
rank_greetings.Shunned: I'll treat you, but prices are double.
rank_greetings.Disliked: You're lucky I took an oath.

heal_full.name: Full Treatment
heal_full.description: Complete medical care - heal all wounds

start.text: You look like you need medical attention. What can I help you with?

services.text: I can patch you up. Here are my services:

service_heal_minor.text: There, that should help. Come back if you need more.

service_heal_full.text: All patched up. You're good as new. Almost.

service_cure_rads.text: Radiation cleared. Stay away from glowing things.

prices.text: Minor treatment is 25 caps. Full treatment is 75. Radiation treatment is 100 caps. I take payment up front.

end.text: Stay healthy out there. The wasteland isn't kind to the injured.

follower_doctor.default_greeting: The Followers offer aid to all who seek it. How can we help?

idle: Have you considered donating to our cause?
combat: Don't let them reach the supplies!
greeting: The Followers are here to help.

heal_free.name: Free Treatment
heal_free.description: Basic healing provided by the Followers

rank_greetings.Idolized: Our greatest supporter! We have much to thank you for.
rank_greetings.Admired: Welcome, friend of the Followers. Your help has been invaluable.
rank_greetings.Liked: Good to see you again. How can we assist?
rank_greetings.Accepted: Welcome to our clinic. We help all who need it.
rank_greetings.Neutral: The Followers offer aid to all who seek it. How can we help?
rank_greetings.Shunned: We help all... but donations would be appreciated.
rank_greetings.Disliked: We don't turn anyone away. But please don't cause trouble.
rank_greetings.Hated: We must help you, but I'd prefer you left quickly.
rank_greetings.Vilified: Even you deserve medical care... just take it and go.

start.text: The Followers offer aid to all who seek it. We have basic medical supplies and knowledge to share.

heal.text: We can provide basic treatment at no cost. Donations are always welcome, of course.

donate.text: Your generosity will help many. Thank you.

about.text: We are the Followers of the Apocalypse. We preserve knowledge, heal the sick, and try to make the wasteland a better place. Education and medicine are our primary tools.

help.text: We always need supplies - medicine, food, books. Or you can spread knowledge. Every little bit helps.

end.text: Stay safe out there. Remember: knowledge is power.
